action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Vining, Hong, Joers, Arney, Billings, Clancy, DeSmidt, Doyle, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Kirsch, Madison, Mayadev, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Phelps, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Spaude, Stroud, Stubbs, Subeck, Tenorio, Bare, DeSanto and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Pfaff, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys and Spreitzer
